images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a lone network engineer at 2am in a dark operations room, holding a large printed network diagram that glows faintly cream, while behind him the real equipment rack blazes with a completely different topology of glowing red cable paths — the mismatch is the story. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accent lines only — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
